## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Schedule a notification with `...`
2. Wait for it to fire
3. Tap / press action button / ...
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **Plugin version**: (e.g., v1.8.1)
- **NativePHP Mobile version**: (e.g., v3.0)
- **PHP version**: (e.g., 8.3)
- **Laravel version**: (e.g., 12.x)
- **Frontend stack**: Livewire / Inertia+Vue / Inertia+React / Plain JS
- **Platform**: Android / iOS / Both
- **Device**: (e.g., Samsung Galaxy A55, iPhone 15)
- **OS version**: (e.g., Android 14, iOS 18.2)

## App State When Bug Occurred

- [ ] App was in foreground (warm start)
- [ ] App was in background
- [ ] App was killed / not running (cold start)

## Logs

If applicable, paste relevant `adb logcat` or Xcode console output.

```
paste logs here
```

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or related issues.
